case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AURHORITY VS. LACRECITA JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AURHORITY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AURHORITY SERVED MAY-10-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LACRECITA
